category_sources: source_facts.description says toolbox for morphological analysers and FST-based tools; official SFST page says it implements morphological analysers and tools based on finite state transducer technology: https://www.cis.uni-muenchen.de/~schmid/tools/SFST/
display_name_sources: Official LMU page heading is SFST: https://www.cis.uni-muenchen.de/~schmid/tools/SFST/
docs_sources: Official SFST page links a short manual and tutorial and describes included tools: https://www.cis.uni-muenchen.de/~schmid/tools/SFST/
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SFST page distributes source archives and links third-party bindings, but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: Official SFST page describes compiler, analysis programs, comparison/printing tools, C++ implementation, UTF-8, and morphological analyzers: https://www.cis.uni-muenchen.de/~schmid/tools/SFST/
